name: Using LLMs for Explainable, Data-Driven Insight Generation from Time Series
summary: arXiv:2607.18271v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Time series forecasts are widely used in decision-critical domains, where they are rarely consumed without accompanying explanations. Producing such...
description: arXiv:2607.18271v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Time series forecasts are widely used in decision-critical domains, where they are rarely consumed without accompanying explanations. Producing such explanations is usually a manual and costly process, and attempts to automate it using large language models often suffer from hallucination when applied to temporal data. We propose a domain-agnostic...
author: Ria Mundhra, Gustavo Sato dos Santos, Michael Benedikt
